name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 31 Aug 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes the e-Commerce releases "},{"text":"6.260.0 to 6.263.0","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Updates and Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Toll IPEC Renamed to IPEC","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Since the rebranding of Toll IPEC to IPEC, we have been changing all the references in our application UI to IPEC."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" ","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Updated Default Name for PayPal Checkout","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The default name for"},{"text":" PayPal Checkout","bold":true},{"text":" has been changed to"},{"text":" PayPal – Pay now","bold":true},{"text":" (if Pay in 4 is disabled) and "},{"text":"PayPal – Pay now or Pay later","bold":true},{"text":" (if Pay in 4 is enabled)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/PayPalPaynow.0685g00000GAX2xAAH.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/PayPalPaynow.0685g00000GAX2xAAH.png","name":"PayPal - Pay now","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":982,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" ","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Updated Hunter Express Postcodes and Zones","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Hunter Express Postcodes and Zones have been updated to reflect the newest changes for August."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Ability to Send","bold":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"DiscountPriceInfo for Variation Products","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now send the DiscountPriceInfo data to eBay for implementing the eBay Strike Through Pricing (STP) option for variation products. Earlier, it was supported only for standalone products."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Note that STP is a deprecated feature, and therefore, this update is applicable for the existing STP-enabled accounts only."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" ","bold":true}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with some eBay orders where VAT/IOSS information was getting appended to the shipping address instead of the eBayCollectAndRemitTaxes element."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where shipping details were not mapped into the My Account page when paying with the PayPal card."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with eParcel International labels where the IOSS number was getting printed on the address field instead of the Importer's Reference field."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where some eBay orders were flagged for incorrect shipping and grand total, causing the application to display a warning and show an amount owed value."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the wrong barcode was being generated when a consignment was created with multiple articles using IPEC as shipping."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
